name: Moist and Minty Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch square pan.
3. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Set aside.
5. In a saucepan, combine sugar, butter, and water. Bring to a boil.
6. Remove from heat. Add chocolate chips and vanilla extract.
7. Stir until chips are melted and mixture is smooth.
8. Transfer to a large mixing bowl.
9. Add eggs, beating well after each addition.
10. Stir in the flour mixture and remaining chips.
11. Spread in prepared pan.
12. Bake for 35 minutes, just until center is set.
13. Cool and cut into squares.
14. Makes 16 brownies.
